headline: CHOOSE THE RIGHT CMO
subheading: A QP-led, risk-based path to selecting a contract manufacturer that protects every batch.
flux_prompt: Abstract editorial illustration evoking risk-based selection of a pharmaceutical contract manufacturer: a clean composition of several frosted-glass candidate panels arranged in a row, one subtly elevated and highlighted to suggest a chosen, vetted partner among options. Faint translucent evaluation scorecards and weighted comparison bars float as soft glowing layers, connected by delicate luminous lines flowing toward a single stainless-steel manufacturing vessel and a row of softly blurred glass vials in the background, suggesting due diligence linking assessment to production. Cool teal and cyan light over a deep navy backdrop, with a subtle emerald-green accent on the selected element. Premium clinical-luxury mood, pristine reflective surfaces, shallow depth of field, calm and decisive, soft volumetric daylight, polished and inspectable. 1500x900 composition, 5:3 aspect ratio, professional editorial illustration, premium quality, clean composition, modern visual storytelling, professional lighting, no text, no watermark, no logo, ultra detailed
